name: Kayba Tracing
description: Captures every OpenClaw agent turn (user message, full LLM prompt + response with thinking, tool calls, final reply) and ships it as a structured Kayba trace. Powers /traces/v2 dashboards and ACE skill extraction.

apiKey.description: Kayba API key (kayba_ak_...). Get one at https://use.kayba.ai/settings/api-keys.

baseUrl.description: Kayba ingest base URL. Defaults to https://use.kayba.ai. Override for self-hosted deployments.

folder.description: Folder name in the Kayba dashboard. Traces from this gateway will be grouped under it. Defaults to the openclaw agent id (e.g. 'main').

captureSystemPrompt.description: Whether to capture the system prompt. Captured once per session (first turn) regardless — disabling skips it entirely.

captureHistory.description: How much of the LLM input historyMessages to include on each llm.call span. 'delta' (default) ships only messages added since the prior turn for this session — keeps traces small while letting the full conversation be reconstructed by joining traces ordered by time within sessionId. 'full' ships the entire history every turn (large). 'none' drops it.

maxAttributeBytes.description: Truncate any single span attribute value above this size (in bytes). Prevents blowing past kayba's per-attribute limits with huge prompts.
